current_hypothesis.core_job_or_situation: An analyst or operations owner has the data needed for reporting, but is blocked while constructing the final stakeholder-facing output in the BI layer.
current_hypothesis.pain: The final table, filter behavior, dashboard interaction, layout, or visual configuration cannot be expressed cleanly enough to deliver a presentation-ready output without awkward workarounds.
current_hypothesis.desired_output: A stakeholder-ready report, table, dashboard interaction, or shareable view that can be delivered without manual reconstruction or tool-specific contortions.
current_hypothesis.different_from_persona_01: persona_01 is broader recurring manual reporting, export churn, spreadsheet rework, and reconciliation burden. persona_05 is narrower and more last-mile: the delivery artifact itself is blocked by BI or reporting-layer behavior.
current_hypothesis.different_from_persona_03: persona_03 is a cleaner generic tool-limitation workaround persona. persona_05 keeps the tool-limitation element but ties it to reporting delivery, presentation readiness, and stakeholder-facing output construction.
should_not_count_as_persona05_evidence: Recurring export burden without final-output construction specificity
Generic tool limitation without reporting delivery context
Auth, connector, refresh, permission, setup, or sandboxing support
Formula or API debugging without stakeholder-facing output context
General feature request without a concrete reporting delivery pain

differentiating_signals: final output shape, layout, or interaction is blocked inside the BI tool
dashboard, filter, pivot, or visual behavior is part of the pain
stakeholder-facing usability matters more than export volume

shared_signals: feature or interaction limitations inside the reporting tool
differentiating_signals: manual_reporting remains the dominant lead signal
the pain is tied to a stakeholder-facing report, dashboard, or shareable artifact
the desired state is a deliverable output, not just feature parity

positive_boundary_rules: The user needs a final table, view, dashboard interaction, report layout, or shareable artifact.
Filter, interaction, layout, or visual configuration blocks the final reporting deliverable.
There is visible last-mile delivery pressure, not just abstract tooling friction.
negative_boundary_rules: Recurring export burden without clear final-output construction specificity.
Generic tool limitation without reporting delivery context.
Auth, connector, refresh, permission, setup, sandboxing, or support troubleshooting.
Formula, API, or automation debugging without stakeholder-facing output context.
General feature request without concrete reporting pain.

next_action.smallest_safe_rule: Require persona_05-supporting evidence to show both a reporting-delivery context and a concrete last-mile output-construction blocker. Downweight or exclude rows that are only generic tool limitation, automation/setup support, or recurring manual reporting without final-output specificity.
